case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS ESPINA JESUS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINA JESUS $1,174.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,231.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINA JESUS
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, GRANTED, EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $30.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,327.23 AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINA JESUS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINA JESUS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $42.16 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINA JESUS
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED
